B2B SaaS · Laptop Rental Management

The Complete OS for
Laptop Rental
Businesses

One platform to manage customers, subscriptions, and devices — built exclusively for India's rental providers. Replace spreadsheets with a system that actually fits.

Schedule a Demo See How It Works
Our Solution

Three Pillars. One Platform.
Built for Rental.

Laptopfirst is the only end-to-end platform purpose-built for laptop rental operators — handling everything from onboarding to collections to device control.

01 · Customer Hub

Onboard Customers in Minutes, Not Days

Replace paper-based KYC and manual credit checks with a fully digital, guided flow. Know your customer's risk profile before you hand over a single device.

🪪

Digital KYC & Identity Verification

Guided in-app flow with Aadhaar/PAN via DigiLocker, video KYC, and document OCR. Auto-flags mismatches and incomplete submissions instantly.

📊

Automated Credit Assessment

Instant CIBIL/Experian bureau pull, configurable risk thresholds, and a rental-specific scoring model built on your own payment history data.

📋

Digital Contracts & 360° CRM

E-sign rental agreements, auto-populate customer data, log every interaction, and get smart alerts on renewals, expiries, and overdue actions.

Aadhaar API DigiLocker Video KYC CIBIL · Experian eSign

02 · Subscription Engine

Payments on Auto-Pilot

Set your billing cycles once and let Laptopfirst handle invoices, payment collection, dunning, and GST compliance — with zero manual effort every month.

🔄

Recurring Invoices & Billing Automation

Auto-generated GST-ready invoices with proration and mid-cycle change support. Handles every edge case without your intervention.

💳

Multi-Mode Payment Collection

UPI AutoPay, NACH mandates, payment links, and card billing via Razorpay and Cashfree. Smart dunning and retry logic reduce defaults significantly.

📈

Revenue Dashboard & Analytics

Live MRR, ARR, collection rate, aging buckets, and churn forecasting. One-click export for your accountant — always audit-ready.

UPI AutoPay NACH Mandate Razorpay Cashfree GST Ready

03 · Device Intelligence

Total Control Over Every Device

Know exactly where every laptop is, who has it, and how healthy it is. Lock or wipe on default. Fix issues remotely before customers even notice a problem.

🗂️

Asset Tracking & Inventory

Every laptop tagged at intake — serial number, specs, photos. Real-time view of which device is with which customer and its current health score.

🔒

Remote Lock, Wipe & Security

Instantly lock or wipe a device when a customer defaults or their agreement lapses. Geofencing alerts and real-time tamper notifications via MDM.

🖥️

Remote Support & Monitoring

One-click screen-share for troubleshooting. Proactive monitoring for disk, battery, OS updates, and malware flags — before customers notice.

MDM Integration Remote Lock/Wipe Geofencing SMART Monitoring Remote Desktop

Not Adapted From It
